subject: Fix pom.xml
commit_message:
Fix pom.xml

Change pom version according to ONAP versioning

Change-Id: I08ec7f2426261e5873b5add3abba2fcd693842b6
Issue-ID: SDC-1316
Signed-off-by: Stone, Avi (as206k) <as206k@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-dcae-d-ci-master-verify-java/2/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.d2:ui-api-ci:jar:1.0.1-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.sdc.dcae-ci-tests:dcae-ci-tests:jar:1.2.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-dcae-d-ci-master-verify-java/2/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-dcae-d-ci-master-verify-java/2
Change has been successfully merged by Michael Lando
